title: Varanasi Heat Wave
lead: Varanasi is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.51. The city's temperature has reached critically high levels.
body:
The current heat wave in Varanasi has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating a CRITICAL Level of severity. 
 The temperature anomaly is causing extremely hot conditions, with a CDD of 14.8 GG and humidity at 46%. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 9.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to mitigate the severe conditions.
